enforceAgentOptIn.label: Agent Opt-In
enforceAgentOptIn.help: Global fallback gate. Surface-specific allowlists override this when present.

wikiDigestEnabledAgents.label: Wiki Digest Agent Pilot
wikiDigestEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for wiki digest. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

wikiDigest.label: Wiki Digest
wikiDigest.help: Inject a small precompiled BrainX Wiki digest instead of live working memory.

jitRecallEnabledAgents.label: JIT Recall Agent Pilot
jitRecallEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for JIT recall. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

jitRecall.label: JIT Recall
jitRecall.help: Inject concise BrainX recall before prompt submission when results are strong enough.

jitRecallAllowCrossAgent.label: JIT Recall: Allow Cross-Agent
jitRecallAllowCrossAgent.help: If false, JIT recall only injects memories whose agent matches the current agent (or NULL/global). Default false to prevent cross-contamination.

jitRecallCrossAgentTagRequired.label: JIT Recall: Require cross-agent Tag
jitRecallCrossAgentTagRequired.help: When cross-agent injection is allowed, require the memory to carry the 'cross-agent' tag. Default true.

jitRecallCrossAgentRequireVerified.label: JIT Recall: Require Verified for Cross-Agent
jitRecallCrossAgentRequireVerified.help: When cross-agent injection is allowed, require verification_state='verified'. Default true.

workingMemoryEnabledAgents.label: Working Memory Agent Pilot
workingMemoryEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for working memory. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

workingMemory.label: Working Memory
workingMemory.help: Maintain a short session-state layer and inject it before historical BrainX recall.

toolAdvisoriesEnabledAgents.label: Tool Advisory Agent Pilot
toolAdvisoriesEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for tool advisories. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

toolAdvisories.label: Tool Advisories
toolAdvisories.help: Look up BrainX advisories before high-risk tool calls.

captureToolFailuresEnabledAgents.label: Failure Capture Agent Pilot
captureToolFailuresEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for tool-failure capture. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

captureToolFailures.label: Tool Failure Capture
captureToolFailures.help: Store conservative memories for meaningful high-risk tool failures.

bootstrapEnabledAgents.label: Bootstrap Agent Pilot
bootstrapEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for bootstrap bridge mode. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

bootstrapMode.label: Bootstrap Bridge Mode
bootstrapMode.help: off|auto|on. Auto only runs plugin bootstrap bridge if the internal BrainX hook is disabled.

captureOutboundEnabledAgents.label: Outbound Capture Agent Pilot
captureOutboundEnabledAgents.help: Optional allowlist for outbound capture bridge mode. Empty means fall back to global agent opt-in.

captureOutboundMode.label: Outbound Capture Mode
captureOutboundMode.help: off|auto|on. Auto only runs plugin outbound capture if the internal live-capture hook is disabled.
